title: Preparation of 1000X Antibiotic Stock Solution
author: NUS iGEM

steps_raw.instruction: Dilute in pure 100% ethanol for chloramphenicol or sterile deionized water for kanamycin and ampicillin.
Syringe filter water-based antibiotic solution using a 0.22-μm filter
